generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. A noble anthropomorphic leopard cat in light armor, riding gracefully across a crystal stream on a small forest stag (representing the forest companion). He holds a single golden cup with great care and reverence. Soft rolling green hills. Deep blue and silver atmospheric lighting. Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Knight of Cups is 'The Gallant Traveler'—a male leopard cat traveling long distances with noble, peaceful intent.

meanings.upright: Romance, imagination, proposal, pursuit of an ideal, and following your heart.
meanings.reversed: Moodiness, unrealistic expectations, or a creative person who is too sensitive/passive.

ecology.mapping_note: Knight of Cups represents 'The Peaceable Walker'—the rare but critical long-distance migrant that maintains genetic diversity between meta-populations.

website.excerpt: A noble wanderer through the forest pathways, bearing the gift of life and the hope of connection.
website.seo_description: Knight of Cups reimagined as a noble leopard cat on a peaceful travel across the ecosystem.
